zh.lifeSummary: Johann Von Thienen至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Johann Von Thienen至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。

nameMeanings.name: Von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Thienen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: North German and Dutch: patronymic from   Thiel  .

variants.name: Thelen
meanings: Dutch and North German: patronymic from a pet form of the ancient Germanic personal name Thietilo. Thelen is a variant of Thielen .

Swedish (Thelén): ornamental or habitational name from the element Thel- of uncertain meaning (see Thelander ) + the adjectival suffix -én, a derivative of Latin -enius ‘relating to’. Compare Thelin .

variants.name: Thiel
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Otto, Hans, Erwin, Egon, Franz, Reinhard, Wolfgang, Angelika, Arno, Bernhard.

North German, Dutch, and Flemish: from a shortened form of the personal name Thietilo, an early medieval pet form of Dietrich (German), Diederik (Dutch), or from some other compound name with the same first element.
Germanized form of Sorbian, Polish, and Czech   Tyl  , a name which is (at least in part) of the same German origin as 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Johann
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: Johann Von Thienen had at least 1 son and 1 daughter.

de.lifeSummary: Johann Von Thienen hatte mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Johann Von Thienen lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia.

ja.lifeSummary: Johann Von Thienenは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Johann Von Thienen(은)는 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Johann Von Thienen teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha.

ru.lifeSummary: У Johann Von Thienen был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: Johann Von Thienen tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija.
